name: get_responses
description: Retrieve submitted responses for a specific Typeform form. Returns an array of response objects, each containing the respondent's answers mapped to field references, submission timestamp, and metadata (landing/submission timestamps, user agent, network ID). Results are paginated. You can filter by date range, completion status, or specific field values. Each answer includes the field ref, type, and the actual answer value.

parameters.name: form_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the form to retrieve responses for.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of responses per page. Default: 25. Maximum: 1000.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter responses submitted after this ISO 8601 date (e.g., '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z').

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Filter responses submitted before this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor token for pagination. Use the token from the previous response to get the next page.

parameters.name: completed
parameters.description: Filter by completion status. Set to true for completed responses only, false for partial responses.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order for responses. Format: 'submitted_at,asc' or 'submitted_at,desc'. Default: 'submitted_at,desc'.

answers.text: The onboarding process could be smoother. Otherwise great service!
